steps.title: Show blocked wealth creation
steps.content: Delaying transfers would lengthen the time working adults must financially support nonworking parents. That added burden would make it harder for those adults to build wealth, so the blank needs a verb meaning hinder or prevent.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice B means increase or add to, which is opposite the passage's logic. Choice C means criticize, and Choice D means exceed or surpass; neither describes harm to wealth creation. The remaining verb means to block or prevent. The answer is A.
